calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-09-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:11am
Judge Pro Tem Michael Lieberman, clerk Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, State Farm Insurance is represented by attorney Dean Pappas; Appellant Woldemaniam Ghebieyeses does not appear. Respondent, Ghenet Ogbagioris appears in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Lieberman.

EXHA (1) Trial brief, Request for Judicial Notice, Declaration
EXHR (A) Various letters and receipts

9:23am
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-18-2011 Judgment Entered
